metadata.name: Create a Variable Depth Tillage Prescription

description: A farmer wants to use variable depth tillage to break up compaction layers, but only till as deep as necessary in different parts of the field.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a soil compaction map of the field, created by an on-the-go sensor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the map showing the depth of the compaction layer across the field.

nodes.task_description: Generate a prescription map that instructs the tillage tool to work just below the compaction layer in each part of the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a prescription file for a variable-depth tillage tool.
